name: Stickman Gun Battle Simulator
description: Stickman Gun Battle Simulator is a fun stickman tower defense game. The stickman world is at war! In this game, you have to use your army to destroy the enemy. Become the ultimate stickman commander! - Strategic tower defense gameplay - Build a stickman army - Melee weapons, pistols, machine guns and sci-fi weapons
tags: Alien, Battle, Casual, Fantasy, Fighting, Shooting, Sim, Simulation, Stickman, Strategy, Unity3D, Violence
